---
title: "Walmart Data Exploration"
author: "Kassim"
format: docx
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
# Load required packages
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(fixest)
library(modelsummary)
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
df <- read_csv("Walmart_Sales.csv")

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Date = parse_date_time(Date, orders = c("dmy","mdy","dmY","mdY")),
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    Store = factor(Store),
    year  = year(Date),
    month = month(Date),
    # log transform for interpretability and to reduce skew
    log_sales = log(Weekly_Sales)
  )

# quick checks
stopifnot(sum(is.na(df$Date)) == 0)
summary(select(df, Weekly_Sales, Temperature, Fuel_Price, CPI, Unemployment))

```

```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Weekly_Sales, group = Store)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.12) +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "Weekly sales", title = "Weekly sales over time by store") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = Temperature, y = Weekly_Sales)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") +
  labs(x = "Temperature (°F)", y = "Weekly sales",
       title = "Raw relationship between temperature and sales (not causal)") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
m_naive <- feols(log_sales ~ Temperature, data = df)
etable(m_naive, digits = 3)
```

```{r}
m_main <- feols(
  log_sales ~ Temperature + Holiday_Flag + Fuel_Price + CPI + Unemployment |
    Store + year + month,
  data = df,
  vcov = ~Store
)

etable(m_naive, m_main, digits = 3)

```

```{r}
bT <- coef(m_main)[["Temperature"]]
seT <- se(m_main)[["Temperature"]]

bT
seT
```

```{r}
m_quad <- feols(
  log_sales ~ Temperature + I(Temperature^2) + Holiday_Flag + Fuel_Price + CPI + Unemployment |
    Store + year + month,
  data = df,
  vcov = ~Store
)

etable(m_main, m_quad, digits = 3)
```

```{r}
df_lag <- df %>%
  arrange(Store, Date) %>%
  group_by(Store) %>%
  mutate(lag_temp = lag(Temperature, 1)) %>%
  ungroup()

m_lag <- feols(
  log_sales ~ Temperature + lag_temp + Holiday_Flag + Fuel_Price + CPI + Unemployment |
    Store + year + month,
  data = df_lag,
  vcov = ~Store
)

etable(m_main, m_lag, digits = 3)
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```         
```
